name: feature-dev-complete
description: Complete feature development lifecycle from research to deployment. Uses Gemini Search for best practices, architecture design, Codex prototyping, comprehensive testing, and documentation generation. Full 12-stage workflow.
capabilities: Research latest best practices using Gemini Search
Analyze existing codebase patterns and architecture
Design system architecture with Claude Architect
Generate architecture diagrams and flow charts
Prototype code with Codex Auto and auto-fix iterations
Run comprehensive tests with theater detection and quality audits
author: DNYoussef
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill. The SKILL.md file contains YAML frontmatter and markdown documentation describing a 12-stage development workflow. All 89 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES triggered by illustrative shell script examples in documentation code blocks. No executable code, scripts, or network operations exist. The skill-report.json correctly identifies 0 risk factors.
valueStatement: Building features manually is slow and error-prone. This skill orchestrates multi-model AI to research, design, prototype, test, and document features in a complete 12-stage workflow.
limitations: Requires access to Gemini, Claude, and Codex models
May need user input for ambiguous design decisions
Cannot make deployment decisions without human approval

useCases.title: Rapid feature delivery
useCases.description: Ship complete features with research, code, tests, and docs in one workflow

useCases.title: Architecture standardization
useCases.description: Ensure consistent patterns across features with automated quality gates

useCases.title: CI/CD integration
useCases.description: Automated PR creation with comprehensive reports and deployment readiness checks

promptTemplates.title: Basic feature request
promptTemplates.prompt: Use feature-dev-complete to build [feature description] in [target directory]

promptTemplates.title: Feature with options
promptTemplates.prompt: Develop [feature] with custom settings: target=[directory], create_pr=[true/false], deploy_after=[true/false]

promptTemplates.title: Full pipeline
promptTemplates.prompt: Run feature-dev-complete for [feature] and create a PR with full documentation and test coverage report

promptTemplates.title: Complex system feature
promptTemplates.prompt: Execute complete feature lifecycle for [complex feature] including architecture diagrams, security review, and production readiness certification

bestPractices: Provide clear feature specifications with acceptance criteria
Specify target directory to integrate with existing codebase structure
Review architecture design before prototyping phase for complex features
Set quality thresholds appropriately for your project standards
antiPatterns: Using vague feature descriptions that lead to ambiguous implementations
Skipping the research phase when building features for unfamiliar domains
Ignoring security scan results to meet deadline pressures
Not reviewing auto-generated tests for edge case coverage

faq.question: What models does this skill use?
faq.answer: Orchestrates Gemini for research and diagrams, Claude for architecture and testing, and Codex for rapid prototyping and auto-fixing.

faq.question: What are the 12 stages?
faq.answer: Research, codebase analysis, swarm initialization, architecture design, diagram generation, prototyping, theater detection, testing, style polish, security review, documentation, and production readiness.

faq.question: How does it integrate with my codebase?
faq.answer: Specify a target directory parameter. The skill copies completed implementation files and runs git operations automatically.

faq.question: Is my code safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This is a prompt-based skill. It orchestrates other AI tools but does not execute arbitrary code or access credentials.

faq.question: What happens if tests fail?
faq.answer: Codex attempts auto-fix for 5 iterations. If issues persist, the workflow halts and requests manual intervention.

faq.question: How does this compare to coding agents?
faq.answer: This skill provides a structured full-lifecycle approach rather than single-turn coding. It includes research, documentation, and quality gates that coding agents typically lack.
